title: Handshake vs Taplio — Honest Comparison for LinkedIn Automation
description: Comparing Handshake and Taplio for LinkedIn automation. Features, pricing, safety, and use cases compared side-by-side to help you choose the right tool.

overview.handshake: Handshake is a LinkedIn automation platform purpose-built for multi-sender rotation. Teams manage unlimited LinkedIn accounts from a single dashboard with built-in warmup, a unified inbox, and premium residential proxies on every plan. Pricing scales by sender count — not per seat — starting at $69/month for 1 sender. Every plan includes unlimited team seats and unlimited workspaces, making it the go-to choice for agencies and sales teams running outreach at scale.
overview.competitor: Taplio is a LinkedIn personal branding and content tool designed for individuals who want to grow their LinkedIn presence. It focuses on content creation, scheduling, analytics, and engagement — not outbound prospecting. Taplio helps users write better posts (with AI assistance), schedule content, track analytics, and find viral content for inspiration. Pricing starts at $49/mo for the Starter plan and goes up to $149/mo for the Pro plan.

featureComparison.handshake: LinkedIn outbound prospecting and lead generation at scale
featureComparison.competitor: LinkedIn personal branding, content creation, and audience growth

featureComparison.handshake: Core feature — automatically rotate outreach across multiple LinkedIn accounts
featureComparison.competitor: Not available — Taplio is designed for individual LinkedIn profiles

featureComparison.handshake: Automated connection requests with personalization, sequences, and follow-ups
featureComparison.competitor: Not available — Taplio doesn't send connection requests or outbound messages

featureComparison.handshake: Not a primary feature — focused on outreach, not content
featureComparison.competitor: Full-featured content calendar with scheduling, AI writing assistant, and carousel creator
AI-powered post writing, content ideas, and viral content inspiration library

featureComparison.handshake: Campaign analytics — acceptance rates, reply rates, conversion tracking across senders
featureComparison.competitor: Profile analytics — follower growth, post performance, engagement rates, best posting times

featureComparison.handshake: Single inbox aggregating conversations from all sender accounts
featureComparison.competitor: Not available — Taplio doesn't manage messaging

featureComparison.handshake: Premium residential proxies included, human-like patterns, smart rate limiting
featureComparison.competitor: Low risk — content scheduling doesn't trigger LinkedIn safety concerns like outbound automation does

featureComparison.handshake: Focused on outreach sequences and messaging
featureComparison.competitor: CRM-lite features for tracking leads, engagement pods, and relationship management

featureComparison.handshake: Unlimited team seats included on every plan

featureComparison.competitor: Each team member needs their own subscription ($49-$149/mo each)

sections.handshakeWins:
These tools serve fundamentally different purposes — but if your goal is generating leads and booking meetings through LinkedIn, Handshake is the clear winner. Taplio doesn't do outbound outreach at all. No connection requests, no automated messages, no follow-up sequences.

For sales teams, agencies, and anyone running LinkedIn prospecting at scale, Handshake provides the core infrastructure: multi-sender rotation, campaign sequences, a unified inbox, and built-in safety features. Taplio simply wasn't built for this use case.

The team pricing also favors Handshake heavily. A team of 5 would pay $199/mo total on Handshake, while 5 Taplio Pro subscriptions would cost $745/mo — and you still wouldn't have outbound capabilities.
sections.competitorWins:
Taplio genuinely excels at what it was built for: LinkedIn personal branding. If your goal is to grow your LinkedIn following, create engaging content, and build thought leadership, Taplio is the better tool.

Its AI content assistant helps you write LinkedIn posts that resonate. The viral content inspiration library shows you what's working in your niche. The content calendar and scheduling features are polished and intuitive. And the analytics give you clear insight into what's driving follower growth and engagement.

For individual creators, founders building a personal brand, or marketers managing LinkedIn content strategy, Taplio is purpose-built and excellent at its job.
sections.whoShouldChooseHandshake: Choose Handshake if you want to generate leads from LinkedIn through outbound outreach. It's built for sales teams, agencies, and growth teams who need to send connection requests, automated messages, and follow-up sequences at scale across multiple LinkedIn accounts.
sections.whoShouldChooseCompetitor: Choose Taplio if you want to grow your LinkedIn personal brand through content. It's built for creators, founders, and marketers who want to post better content, grow their audience, and build thought leadership — not for sending outbound messages.
sections.verdict: Handshake and Taplio aren't really competitors — they're complementary tools for different LinkedIn strategies. Taplio builds your audience through content; Handshake fills your pipeline through outreach. Many teams actually use both: Taplio for their founder/CEO's personal brand, and Handshake for the sales team's outbound campaigns. If you have to choose one, pick based on your primary goal: pipeline generation → Handshake, audience growth → Taplio.

faqs.question: Can Taplio send LinkedIn connection requests or messages?
faqs.answer: No. Taplio is a content and personal branding tool — it doesn't send connection requests, automated messages, or follow-up sequences. For outbound LinkedIn outreach, you need a tool like Handshake.

faqs.question: Can I use Handshake and Taplio together?
faqs.answer: Yes, and many teams do. Use Taplio for content creation and personal brand growth on your founder/executive profiles, and Handshake for outbound prospecting through your sales team's LinkedIn accounts. The two tools complement each other well.

faqs.question: Is Taplio cheaper than Handshake?
faqs.answer: Taplio's Starter plan ($49/mo) is cheaper than Handshake's Solo plan ($69/mo), but they serve different purposes. Comparing their prices is like comparing a content calendar to a CRM — the right choice depends on what you're trying to accomplish.

faqs.question: Does Taplio have multi-sender features?
faqs.answer: No. Taplio is designed for individual LinkedIn profiles. Each team member needs their own subscription. Handshake's multi-sender rotation and unlimited team seats are built for collaborative outbound teams.

faqs.question: Which tool is safer for my LinkedIn account?
faqs.answer: Both are safe in different ways. Taplio's content scheduling carries minimal LinkedIn risk since it's not doing outbound automation. Handshake protects outbound accounts with premium residential proxies, warmup automation, and human-like sending patterns.
